query:

  ADD COLUMN emailVerificationCode VARCHAR(6) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN emailVerificationExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN emailVerified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
